server.description: Server code changes require npm test to pass

frontend.description: Frontend changes require npm test AND either e2e tests or a Playwright browser check

migrations.description: Migration changes require npm test (which applies migrations to test DB)

config.description: Config changes (package.json, ecosystem.config.js) require npm test to verify nothing broke

tests.description: Test file changes require running the tests they define

client_deliverables.description: Client deliverables require factual claims verified from current-session sources

intelligence.description: Intelligence bank changes require reading actual bank content

docs.description: Documentation changes do not require verification

harness.description: Harness code changes require harness tests to pass
